def rank_search_results(query, candidates, *, limit=20):
    normalized = normalize_query(query)
    query_terms = set(tokenize_identifier(normalized))
    scored = []
    for candidate in candidates:
        lexical = jaccard(query_terms, candidate.identifier_terms)
        path_bonus = 0.15 if normalized in candidate.path.lower() else 0.0
        exact_bonus = 0.35 if candidate.name.lower() == normalized else 0.0
        semantic = candidate.embedding_score or 0.0
        score = lexical * 0.45 + semantic * 0.40 + path_bonus + exact_bonus
        if candidate.is_generated:
            score *= 0.70
        scored.append((score, candidate.path, candidate.start_line, candidate))
    scored.sort(key=lambda item: (-item[0], item[1], item[2]))
    return [item[3] for item in scored[:limit]]
